title: wedelia ehrenbergii subsp. veronicifolia
intro: Wedelia ehrenbergii subsp. veronicifolia, also known as Wedelia, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Wedelia include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and promoting wound healing, as well as exhibiting potential antiviral and anticancer properties. Wedelia is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
